image_prompts: Based on the attached image reference. Hyper-realistic cinematic live-action still frame, vertical 9:16. Fluffie (same main subject) is a young moss dragon: small bipedal creature covered in soft dense green moss-fur with tiny leaf tufts, flexible leafy spikes along the head/back/tail ridge, large glossy teal eyes with deep reflections, and pale stone-like belly scales. Inside an indoor American bobsled start house (Utah/Lake Placid vibe), Fluffie stands beside a glossy black bobsled, one clawed hand resting on the cockpit rim. Cold blue-gray ice floor, faint frosty haze, condensation on metal, sharp arena lights, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed moss texture and carbon-fiber surfaces, spectators and cameras blurred in the distance. No text, no subtitles, no logos, no readable brand names.

Based on the attached image reference. Cinematic live-action still, vertical 9:16. Fluffie (young moss dragon) now wears a matte-black full-face helmet with a clear visor; teal eyes visible through reflections. Fluffie sits low inside the glossy black bobsled cockpit, tiny clawed hands gripping the rim. Cold mist in the start chute, overhead lights streak softly, shallow DOF, realistic scuffs on the sled and fine frost specks on the visor edges. No text/logos.

Based on the attached image reference. Hyper-realistic live-action still, vertical 9:16. Top/three-quarter angle showing the glossy black bobsled entering the ice chute. Fluffie is visible in the cockpit with helmet and visor, centered. Crisp ice texture, cold haze, overhead lights and blue-gray walls, shallow DOF with motion blur beginning at the edges. No text/logos.
